summary: Comprehensive ColHeader sort/filter testing across all 18 admin table sections. 17/19 tabs PASS with ColHeader buttons correctly implemented and functional. Sort and filter functionality verified working. 1 genuine bug found (Subscriptions missing ColHeader on Amount/Tax/Currency). 2 empty-state failures (Coupons, Partner Submissions) where ColHeader code exists but table only renders with data.

ui_bugs.issue: Amount, Tax, Currency columns use plain <th> instead of ColHeader (SubscriptionsTab.tsx lines 310-312). Task requires ColHeader on ALL columns including Amount, Tax, Currency.

Coupons table (including ColHeader) is wrapped in `coupons.length === 0 ? <empty-div> : <table>`. With no coupons in DB, ColHeader buttons are not visible. ColHeader IS implemented in code (line 868-874) but users see empty state with no sort/filter.

Partner Submissions table (with ColHeader) only renders when displayItems.length > 0. Default statusFilter='pending', no pending submissions → empty state → ColHeader not visible. ColHeader IS implemented in code (lines 155-160).

passed_tabs.products_categories: PASS - Name, Description, Products, Status - popover OK

sort_filter_verification.sort_works: VERIFIED - Plans License Plans: sort changed row order (Professional→Free Trial first after A→Z sort)
sort_filter_verification.filter_works: VERIFIED - Products: 20 rows → 17 rows after filtering by 'a'. Filter updates table in real-time.
sort_filter_verification.popover_verified: All 17 passing tabs show Sort+Filter popover with Sort section (Sort=True, Filter=True)

old_filter_bar_removal.notes: No standalone <select> elements found outside table elements on any tested tab. Old filter bars (search input + partner_id/status/plan_id/interval dropdowns) are removed.

action_items: FIX: SubscriptionsTab.tsx lines 310-312 - Replace plain <th> for Amount, Tax, Currency with <ColHeader> component (same pattern as other columns in that file)
OPTIONAL: Consider rendering table header even in empty state for Coupons section (PlansTab.tsx line 859) and Partner Submissions table so users can see available sort/filter columns
NOTE: Plans > Coupons ColHeader IS implemented at PlansTab.tsx lines 868-874, no code change needed unless empty state behavior is to be changed
NOTE: Partner Submissions ColHeader IS implemented at PartnerSubmissionsTab.tsx lines 155-160, no code change needed unless empty state behavior is to be changed
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionsTab.tsx lines 310-312: Amount, Tax, Currency columns NOT converted to ColHeader despite task requirement. These are plain <th> elements. Easy fix: wrap with ColHeader component like the adjacent columns.

Conditional table rendering in PlansTab.tsx (CouponsSection) and PartnerSubmissionsTab.tsx hides column headers (including ColHeader) when data is empty. Consider always rendering <thead> with ColHeader to allow sort/filter controls to be visible even with empty data.
PlansTab.tsx line 872 'Flags' column uses plain <th> (no ColHeader) - this may be intentional as Flags is a computed display column.

success_rate.frontend: 89% (17/19 tabs fully passing, 1 additional partial pass with bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Login: partner code 'automate-accounts', then admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. Admin panel at /admin. ColHeader uses CSS 'uppercase' class so innerText() returns uppercase - use case-insensitive comparison. Sidebar items have role='tab'. Plans/Products/Resources have sub-tabs within the page (content area x>400) vs sidebar tabs. Plans Coupons section and Partner Submissions show empty state (no data in test env) so ColHeader buttons won't be visible there. Subscriptions tab has Amount/Tax/Currency as plain <th> - this is the main remaining bug.

rca_of_issues.subscriptions_missing_colheader: Root cause: Developer forgot to convert Amount, Tax, Currency columns in SubscriptionsTab.tsx (lines 310-312) from plain <th> to ColHeader component during the migration. All other columns in the same table were correctly converted. Fix: Replace 3 plain <th> elements with ColHeader components following the same pattern as Renewal, Start, Contract End columns.
rca_of_issues.empty_state_colheader: Root cause: Coupons table (PlansTab.tsx) and Submissions table (PartnerSubmissionsTab.tsx) use conditional rendering - the entire <table> element is only shown when data exists. This means ColHeader buttons in <thead> are not accessible when data is empty. This is a common pattern but prevents users from seeing available sort/filter options when first landing on an empty section.
